description_long: This is a tall, freestanding wooden cabinet with a hutch-style design, featuring three open shelves on the upper section and a lower section with two hinged doors and four drawers. The wood has a warm, medium-brown finish with visible grain patterns, giving it a classic and sturdy appearance. The lower cabinet doors are slightly ajar, revealing a spacious interior for storage, while the drawers are equipped with round metal knobs for easy access. The open shelving above is ideal for displaying items or storing books, dishes, or decorative objects. The back panel is solid, providing structural support and a finished look. The overall construction suggests durability and functionality, suitable for use in urban environments such as homes, offices, or community spaces.
description: A tall, brown wooden cabinet with open shelves above and a lower section featuring drawers and hinged doors, finished with metal handles. The design is classic and functional, ideal for storage and display.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the cabinet and the protruding doors and handles on the lower section.
description_view_1: Front view displaying three open shelves, four drawers, and two hinged doors, with one door partially open.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the cabinet's thickness and the side profile of the handles and doors.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the solid wooden back panel and the overall rectangular structure.
